name: Resting Metabolic Rate Calculator
seo_description: Use our free rmr calculator to quickly estimate rmr based on weight, height, age. No registration needed.
result_context: The RMR es ligeramente lesser que BMR; representa calories necesarias in estado of reposo completo.
formula_display: Hombre: RMR = 9.99 × weight + 6.25 × height - 4.92 × edad + 5; Mujer: RMR = 9.99 × weight + 6.25 × height - 4.92 × edad - 161
steps: The calculador aplica The formula automatically and muestra results
mistakes: No Verify que weight estén in units correctas antes of Calculate
Redondear values intermedios antes of the calculation final (pierde precisión)
Apply results without Consider contexto individual or condiciones especiales
desc: Free online rmr calculator. Enter weight and height to get instant results.
